name: variance-analysis
description: Sales variance analysis workflow with reviewable charts, exploded drilldowns, root-cause outputs, and driver interpretation.

interface.shortDescription: Run sales variance analysis with reviewable outputs, exploded drilldowns, and waterfall PNGs.
interface.longDescription: Self-contained sales variance workflow for CSV or Excel sales datasets. It inspects columns, confirms only unresolved required mappings, prepares legacy-backed YTD or rolling period buckets when requested, and automatically runs the complete natural package: price/volume/mix, net-of-discount, margin period totals, the legacy Price / Units / Mix decomposition ladder, fixed-dimension and exploded parent/child variance bridges, root-cause variance across dimension combinations, alternative sweep, automatic drilldowns, main waterfall PNG output, standard component small-multiples output when a useful dimension exists, diagnostics, model-context files, a structured source pack for reporting consumers, client-ready Word report, audit outputs, and business-driver interpretation. The scripts do not make direct model API calls.
defaultPrompt: Use Variance Analysis on the sales CSV or Excel file I provide.

Inspect the columns, ask only for required mappings that cannot be inferred, run the complete deterministic variance package including root-cause sweep, drilldowns, main waterfall, standard component small multiples where applicable, write the charts and client-ready report, and interpret the largest drivers from the source data.
